content:
女王的戒律和魔女的寬簷帽都有「若裝備者的指令卡進入超維空間，裝備者獲得狂氣」的功能。於是遇到以下狀況：

1️⃣沒有那麼奇怪的隊伍：旺達戴女王的戒律

全隊裝備如附件一，實戰如附件二。

可以見到回合開始時第一張牌處於「可能可以」進入超維空間的狀態，此時不要湮滅直接出牌，牌沒有進入超維空間。
魔女的寬簷帽沒有給予狂氣；但不知為何女王的戒律給了。

老實說這個搞不好很遠古bug了。

.

2️⃣奇怪的隊伍：彌利亞姆戴女王的戒律

全隊裝備如附件三，實戰如附件四。

回合開始時第一張牌處於「可以」進入超維空間的狀態，此時不要出指令卡改出聖禮/執妄，他們會且都會給彌利亞姆狂氣。這張卡不僅沒有進入超維空間就發動了女王的戒律的狂氣效果，甚至可以發動不只一次。

但是觸發條件不明確，如果讓彌利亞姆同時裝配女王的戒律和魔女的寬簷帽，似乎就完全不會觸發。

我想大概沒有人遇到過這個bug，因為沒有人會這樣戴。

唉，這個bug修掉了，奇怪隊伍的光速回狂彌利亞姆就再見了⋯⋯

I’m currently playing Wave 2 Alert 2 D-Tide. Winkle’s psyche reforged card should give an additional 90 shield from the leap effect on top of the 132 shield, but it only grants the leap effect’s 90 shield. I’m reasonably sure this is a glitch or a wording issue; it never states that the shield gain is 90 INSTEAD of 132, and other leap effects have the effect trigger on top of the text before it, not replacing it. I haven’t been able to test this but I will give updates if this issue persists

Allows Users to

- Decrease / Increase the Edify Levels of their Awakeners
- Decrease / Increase the Character Levels of their Awakenerss
- Decrease / Increase the Skill Levels of their Awakeners
- Decrease / Increase the Enlightenment Levels of their Awakeners
- Decrease / Increase the Levels of their Covenant Pieces
- Decrease / Increase the Stats of their Covenant Pieces
- Decrease / Increase the Enlightenment Levels of their Wheel of Destinies 
- Decrease / Increase the Madness Omen Levels of their Awakeners 
- Decrease / Increase the Soulforge Aptitude of their Awakeners 
- Decrease / Increase the Level of their Account
- Play any Posse of their choice  
- Select any specific Stage + Difficulty of each Chapter (or Event) 

But, in turn will receive no Rewards upon Completion

To better test the Floor / Ceiling of Old / New Awakeners in specific Team Comps / Builds. This will also be intended for Older Players to better demonstrate how to defeat certain Stages with Awakeners, Covenants, WoDs and Posse Skills that Newer Players will be more familiar with

If you stun the boss after triggering its first phase transition and then kill it the next turn, the fight ends instead of triggering the 3rd phase. I didn't test whether this also occurs during the other phase shifts.
